What are the advantages of double lumen endotracheal tube?
Yes, one of the advantages is that the diseased lung can be collapsed.
Second advantage of double lumen endotracheal tube is that bronchoscope is possible in the diseased lung.
If you want you can put the bronchoscope or if you want you can do the lavage or suction also.
Third advantage is that if both the lungs are with the single trachea, single endotracheal tube, then if diseased lung doesn't expand then healthy also doesn't expand.
because it gives you resistance.
And that way, optimal gas exchange will not be there.
But in the double lumen endotracheal tube, the healthy lung has an optimal gas exchange and the better oxygen saturation you can achieve.
So that's why double lumen endotracheal tube has to be introduced.
